title: My journey into UFOs with Garry Nolan and Jacques Vallée
summary: Jesse Michels discusses his journey into UFO research, including meetings with Stanford microbiologist Garry Nolan and legendary UFO researcher Jacques Vallée. The conversation covers alleged crash materials with anomalous isotope ratios and implications about the nature of reality, time, and space.

key_claims.claim: Garry Nolan claims to have crash parts in his lab with isotope ratios that don't naturally exist on Earth
One sample had natural magnesium ratio while another had magnesium ratios so far off Earth normal that they appeared to be engineered
The UFO phenomenon is teaching us that we don't understand time and space
